main_findings: The sorted-evidence top3 control condition produced parseable 3-row tables for 3/3 pilot questions.
It achieved 2/3 exact top-3 lists and 6/9 rank-position stock codes.
The model copied evidence rows rather than inventing products: 9/9 generated rows are from the evidence table.
It also copied amounts for selected products: 9/9 generated amounts match the selected evidence row.
Compare evidence-prefix rows with exact accuracy to separate copying behavior from sorting behavior.
recommended_next_step: This condition still failed despite the structured table contract. Next inspect generated examples before scaling, then decide whether to continue prompt controls or return to detector work.
